decision-tree.root-question: Can the sentiment tracker run for this project right now?

branch.when: documented_consent == true AND project_length_weeks >= 8 AND stakeholder_register_stable == true
branch.question: Did this week's classification show a decline or single-week hostile signal?

branch.conclusion: Fire the alarm to the PM channel within 24h, then require r5-action-plan-attached within 72h before the next run.
Emit the weekly entry (use class=`no-signal` if zero artefacts arrived); schedule next weekly run.
Block. Resolve consent (org policy citation or per-stakeholder opt-in) before any ingestion.
Skip. Trend signal needs ≥4 weekly data points to be useful; defer to ad-hoc check-ins instead.

example.p: Sponsor Maria's class went supportive→cautious→cautious over two consecutive weeks. → 2-week decline → conclusion r4-two-week-alarm fires alarm; PM has 72h to file action plan.
